name: KONG AirDog Donut-Medium
description: KONG AirDog Squeaker Donut combines two classic dog toys -the tennis ball and the squeaker - to create the perfect fetch toy. The non-abrasive, high-quality material will not wear down dogs teeth. Find your dog's favourite AirDog shape and let the games begin. Fetch toy for healthy, active play Non-abrasive KONG Tennis material, softer on teeth Squeaker entices play Available in three sizes: S, M and L
